reasoning: Shantanu Thakur is the one who came to our gatherings, who spoke for us when no one else did, who brought Modi-ji's promise to the Matuas. My card is in my hand because of him — this is not something I forget. The card means I belong here after fifty years, after everything. I will vote for him again because he kept his word to us when so many others ignored us.
primary_drivers: Shantanu Thakur's personal leadership in securing CAA and Matua citizenship
The card itself — tangible proof of belonging after a lifetime of invisible weight
Deep emotional gratitude to BJP for fulfilling the promise that felt impossible before
